example: The campus is very large and has many trees.
You need to get your course schedule from the registrar.
There is a beautiful fountain in front of the library.
The old building has a brick facade.
Let's have lunch at the cafeteria after class.
You can buy your textbooks at the campus bookstore.
The graduation ceremony will be held in the auditorium.
The school's sports facilities include a gym and a swimming pool.
The new science building has a very modern design.
The bookstore sells university merchandise like T-shirts and mugs.
Please put your luggage on the rack above your seat.
She works at the financial aid office on campus.
Many students apply for financial aid to pay for tuition.
His locker is at the end of the hallway.
The career center helps students find internships.
You can pay for your books at the front counter.
The campus shuttle bus is very convenient for getting around.
